title: Ability to show images (from Files not People columns) on cards in shared dashboard
excerpt: i’m attempting to use the shared view and opening in a different browser (to test). when i’m logged into monday.com the cards have cover images. when i use the share view link in a separate browser, they’re missing. it w…

posts.author: MauraAckerman (Maura Ackerman)
posts.cookedHtml: i’m attempting to use the shared view and opening in a different browser (to test). when i’m logged into monday.com the cards have cover images. when i use the share view link in a separate browser, they’re missing. it would be great to be able to have the images available to view

posts.author: Jhoover (Justin Hoover)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be very useful!

posts.author: lfas (Luis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday likes visuals, they say… But I agree that there should be security tools for sharing spreadsheets, but visualizing columns with images or videos is essential for external observers.

Hopefully, Monday will activate that strangely disabled feature.
